Trade and wholesale accounts

Accounting software for traders, wholesalers and retail businesses.

Fastbooks helps trading businesses capture sales, purchase bills, daily expenses, bank receipts and outstanding follow-ups without typing every accounts entry from scratch.

Request Early Access See bank entry workflow

Direct answer

What is the best accounting workflow for traders?

For Indian traders, the best accounting workflow is one that captures sales, purchase bills, collections, vendor payments and bank receipts as they happen, then sends review-ready entries to the accountant. Fastbooks is built around this capture-first workflow: bills, bank rows, receipts and voice notes become draft sales, purchase, expense and bank entries for review.

  • Capture sales and purchase context early.
  • Use bank rows to prepare receipt and payment drafts.
  • Keep GST, party and ledger decisions reviewable.

Trader workflows

Designed for the accounts work traders repeat.

Sales and collections

Prepare sales and receipt entries with party and invoice match suggestions.

Purchase bills

Capture supplier bills and tax hints for review before posting.

Outstanding follow-up

See who needs payment reminders and which receipts may clear pending invoices.

Example

From bank text to receipt entry.

Bank statement

“NEFT RECEIVED SHARMA TRADERS HDFC ₹85,000”

EntryPartyAmountAction
ReceiptSharma Traders₹85,000Review match

Trader checklist

What traders should evaluate before choosing accounts software.

Credit sales

Can the workflow preserve customer and invoice context?

Purchase bills

Can supplier bills be captured before month-end?

Bank receipts

Can bank narration help prepare receipt entries and outstanding matches?

FAQ

Accounting software for traders FAQs

What should accounting software for traders handle?

Accounting software for traders should handle sales, purchase bills, bank receipts, vendor payments, outstanding balances, GST review and accountant approval. Fastbooks focuses on preparing these entries faster from daily business inputs.

How can traders reduce manual accounts entry?

Traders can reduce manual accounts entry by capturing bills, receipts, bank rows and voice notes as transactions happen. Fastbooks prepares draft sales, purchase, expense and bank entries for review.

Does Fastbooks handle inventory for traders?

Fastbooks should currently be positioned around accounting entry preparation and review. Inventory-specific claims should be kept conservative unless full inventory workflows are implemented and verified.
